ddls:
CREATE TABLE "products" (
  "product_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each product */,
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the product category */,
  "building_type_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the building type */,
  "service_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the service type */,
  "product_name" TEXT /* Name of the product */,
  "manufacturer" TEXT /* Manufacturer of the product */,
  "model_number" TEXT /* Model number of the product */,
  "baseline_efficiency" REAL /* Baseline efficiency of the product */,
  "current_efficiency" REAL /* Current efficiency of the product */,
  "price" REAL /* Current price of the product */,
  "warranty_period" INTEGER /* Warranty period of the product in months */,
  "energy_star_rating" INTEGER /* Indicates if the product has an Energy Star rating */,
  "date_added" TEXT /* Date when the product was added to the database */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date and time when the product information was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("product_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_products_category_id FOREIGN KEY ("category_id") REFERENCES categories ("category_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_products_service_id FOREIGN KEY ("service_id") REFERENCES services ("service_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_products_building_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("building_type_id") REFERENCES building_types ("building_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "categories" (
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each category */,
  "category_name" TEXT /* Name of the product category */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the category */,
  "parent_category_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the parent category (for hierarchical categories) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("category_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_categories_parent_category_id FOREIGN KEY ("parent_category_id") REFERENCES categories ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "building_types" (
  "building_type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each building type */,
  "building_type_name" TEXT /* Name of the building type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the building type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("building_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "services" (
  "service_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each service type */,
  "service_name" TEXT /* Name of the service */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the service */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("service_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "pricing_history" (
  "pricing_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each pricing record */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* ID of the product */,
  "price" REAL /* Price of the product at this date */,
  "change_date" TEXT /* Date when the price was recorded */,
  "price_change_percent" REAL /* Percentage change in price from previous record */,
  "reason_for_change" TEXT /* Reason for the price change */,
  "effective_date" TEXT /* Date when the price change takes effect */,
  "approved_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who approved the price change */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("pricing_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_pricing_history_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES products ("product_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_pricing_history_approved_by FOREIGN KEY ("approved_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "efficiency_history" (
  "efficiency_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each efficiency record */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* ID of the product */,
  "baseline_efficiency" REAL /* Baseline efficiency of the product */,
  "current_efficiency" REAL /* Current efficiency of the product */,
  "efficiency_change_date" TEXT /* Date when the efficiency was recorded */,
  "reason_for_change" TEXT /* Reason for the efficiency change */,
  "approved_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who approved the efficiency change */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("efficiency_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_efficiency_history_approved_by FOREIGN KEY ("approved_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_efficiency_history_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES products ("product_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "elasticity_metrics" (
  "elasticity_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each elasticity record */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* ID of the product */,
  "price_elasticity" REAL /* Price elasticity of demand for the product */,
  "efficiency_improvement_percent" REAL /* Percentage improvement in efficiency from baseline */,
  "price_change_percent" REAL /* Percentage change in product price */,
  "confidence_interval" REAL /* Confidence interval for the elasticity metric */,
  "sample_size" INTEGER /* Sample size used for the elasticity calculation */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("elasticity_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_elasticity_metrics_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES products ("product_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., analyst, manager, developer) */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password of the user */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date and time of the last login */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the user's account (e.g., active, suspended) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access log entry */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the system */,
  "access_time" TEXT /* Timestamp of the access event */,
  "action" TEXT /* Action taken by the user (e.g., view, edit, delete) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the access occurred */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent used for the access (e.g., browser, device) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "generated_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who generated the report */,
  "report_date" TEXT /* Date when the report was generated */,
  "report_type" TEXT /* Type of report (e.g., efficiency, pricing) */,
  "content" TEXT /* Content of the report */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the report (e.g., draft, published) */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date and time when the report was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reports_generated_by FOREIGN KEY ("generated_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
